title: hemerocallis middendorffii var. esculenta
intro: Hemerocallis middendorffii var. esculenta, commonly known as the Day Lily or Tiger Lily, is a plant species that belongs to the family Hemerocallidaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Hemerocallis middendorffii var. esculenta include decoctions and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
